subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in the Ridván! Hearken unto the call of your Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, He maketh mention of you as a bounty from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی فی الرضوان ان استمعوا ندآء ربکم الرحمن انه یذکرکم فضلا من عنده
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
